title: ChainCraft Web3 Summit
description: ChainCraft Web3 Summit brings together blockchain developers, DeFi architects, and NFT creators for an intensive 36-hour hackathon. Build decentralized applications on Ethereum, Solana, or Polygon. Focus areas include DeFi protocols, DAO tooling, cross-chain bridges, and Web3 identity. Sponsors provide testnet tokens, audit credits, and deployment infrastructure. This event is ideal for teams passionate about ownership, transparency, and composability.
rules: Smart contracts must be deployed on approved testnets. No mainnet deployments during the event. Teams of 2–5. All contracts must include basic test coverage. Security best practices are evaluated by judges.
eligibility: Open to developers with basic Solidity or Rust experience. Students and professionals welcome. KYC not required for testnet-only projects.

tracks.name: DeFi & Protocol Design
tracks.description: Build decentralized finance protocols with novel tokenomics or yield mechanisms.
tracks.problemStatement: Design a lending protocol with dynamic interest rates based on on-chain utilization metrics. Include liquidation logic and a simple frontend.

tracks.name: AI-Powered Trading & Analytics
tracks.description: Combine machine learning with on-chain data for predictive analytics.
tracks.problemStatement: Build an AI agent that analyzes wallet behavior and DEX liquidity patterns to surface actionable trading signals. All predictions must cite on-chain evidence.

tracks.name: Web3 Developer Tooling
tracks.description: Create tools that improve the Web3 developer experience.
tracks.problemStatement: Build a VS Code extension or CLI that audits smart contracts for common vulnerabilities and suggests gas optimizations in real time.

timeline.label: Registration Opens
timeline.description: Sign up and claim testnet faucet credits from sponsors.

timeline.label: Registration Closes
timeline.description: Last day to register teams and select tracks.

timeline.label: Hackathon Begins
timeline.description: Opening keynote on Web3 security and team hacking starts.

timeline.label: Submission Deadline
timeline.description: Submit repos, contract addresses, and demo videos.

timeline.label: Judging
timeline.description: Technical review and live contract demos.

timeline.label: Results
timeline.description: Winners announced and sponsor networking session.

faqs.question: Which chains are supported?
faqs.answer: Ethereum Sepolia, Polygon Amoy, and Solana Devnet. Deploy on at least one.

faqs.question: Are audit tools provided?
faqs.answer: Yes. CertiK and Slither integrations are available in the starter kit.

faqs.question: Can we use existing smart contract templates?
faqs.answer: OpenZeppelin and Solmate libraries are allowed. Custom logic must be original.

faqs.question: Is KYC required?
faqs.answer: No KYC for participation. Prize disbursement may require identity verification.

faqs.question: How are gas costs covered?
faqs.answer: Each team receives testnet ETH/MATIC/SOL from sponsor faucets upon registration.

faqs.question: What if our contract has a bug?
faqs.answer: Testnet-only deployments are expected. Document known limitations in your README.
